name: nfd-divergence
notes: agent_id uses NFD encoding: the character U+00E9 (e with acute) is represented as U+0065 (e) + U+0301 (combining acute accent), UTF-8 bytes 0x65 0xCC 0x81. RFC 8785 JCS is byte-preserving; it does NOT apply Unicode normalization. NFC (UTF-8 0xC3 0xA9) and NFD (UTF-8 0x65 0xCC 0x81) produce different canonical byte strings and therefore different digests. The schema MUST require producers to emit a specific normalization form (NFC is the web-safe default per W3C). expected_divergent_digest is the NFD digest; nfc_reference_digest is the NFC digest (what a conformant NFC producer would emit). Any verifier pinning the NFC digest MUST reject the NFD input.
